title: Day-1 gate verification — final convergence check before rc.2 implementation begins
scope: Verification only — no source files modified
description: Execute all Day-1 gate checks defined in planning-context.md to confirm the grill-me follow-up engineering landing is complete and rc.2 implementation can safely begin. Verifies: (1) v1-vocabulary cache vocabulary purged (rule-test.index, rule_baseline, baseline_synced, legacy_client_path_present); (2) v2 cache file at new location; (3) fabric-config schema has knowledge_language + default_layer_filter; (4) api-contracts schema has layer_filter, redirect_to, FabExtractKnowledgeInput, FabReviewInput; (5) event-ledger has 11 newly registered knowledge_* event types; (6) docs split landed (data-schema.md + mcp-contracts.md exist, schema.md gone); (7) fabric-monorepo's fabric-config.json declares zh-CN; (8) full build + test + lint green. NO commit — verification phase only. Outcome: PASS = open rc.2 work; FAIL = remediate failing checks before rc.2.
implementation: Run gate 1 — v1 cache vocabulary purge: `! grep -rE 'rule-test\.index|rule_baseline|baseline_synced|legacy_client_path_present' packages/` — exits 1 (= empty match = pass)
Run gate 2 — old cache file gone: `test ! -f .fabric/rule-test.index.json`
Run gate 3 — new cache file exists (regenerated by tests): `test -f .fabric/.cache/knowledge-test.index.json` (run `pnpm test` first if needed to regenerate)
Run gate 4 — fabric-config schema fields: `grep -q 'knowledge_language' packages/shared/src/schemas/fabric-config.ts && grep -q 'default_layer_filter' packages/shared/src/schemas/fabric-config.ts`

Run gate 5 — api-contracts schema fields: `grep -q 'layer_filter' packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts && grep -q 'redirect_to' packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts && grep -q 'FabExtractKnowledgeInput' packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts && grep -q 'FabReviewInput' packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts`

Run gate 6 — event-ledger 11 new types: `grep -cE 'knowledge_(proposed|promoted|promote_started|promote_failed|layer_changed|slug_renamed|demoted|archived|archive_attempted|deferred|rejected)' packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts | awk '$1 >= 11'`
Run gate 7 — docs split: `test -f docs/data-schema.md && test -f docs/mcp-contracts.md && test ! -f docs/schema.md`
Run gate 8 — dogfood config: `jq -r .knowledge_language .fabric/fabric-config.json | grep -q zh-CN`
Aggregate: any gate fails → list failing gate(s) and remediate; all pass → record PASS with timestamp
Optional: append a verification report to planning-context.md or session folder (e.g. `verification.md` with gate-by-gate results)

reference.pattern: Day-1 gate — final pre-flight check before opening next workstream
reference.examples: Follow rc.2-prep TASK-008 / Day-1 gate pattern (commits da80d5e..97103ab) — bash gates with grep + test + jq + pnpm build/test/lint

criteria: Gate 3 passes — `test -f .fabric/.cache/knowledge-test.index.json` exits 0 after fresh `pnpm test`
Gate 4 passes — both knowledge_language and default_layer_filter found in fabric-config.ts
Gate 5 passes — all 4 of layer_filter/redirect_to/FabExtractKnowledgeInput/FabReviewInput found in api-contracts.ts
Gate 6 passes — ≥ 11 of the 11 new knowledge_* event-type names found in event-ledger.ts
Gate 7 passes — docs/data-schema.md and docs/mcp-contracts.md exist; docs/schema.md does not
Aggregate verdict: ALL 11 gates pass = ready for rc.2 implementation

scope_boundary: OUT OF SCOPE: any source code changes (this is verification only); creating new tests (existing tests run as-is); modifying any plan/task files; committing — NO commit produced (this task is verification-only). If any gate fails, remediation goes back to the corresponding TASK-001..009 (not handled here).

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure-verification gate task running 11 deterministic checks; no source change; failure → caller remediates the corresponding upstream task; success → green-light rc.2
alternatives_considered: Skip verification (risks opening rc.2 on unstable foundation)
Roll into TASK-009 (mixes config commit with verification — bad atomicity)
decision_factors: Day-1 gate is grill-locked (Q7) — cannot be skipped
Bash-scriptable gates are reproducible and CI-friendly
Atomic failure isolation — failing gate points to specific upstream task
rationale.tradeoffs: 11 gates is verbose but each is a single-line bash check — accepted because the alternative (compound check) would lose specificity on which dimension fails

manual_checks: Run all 11 gates in sequence — confirm each exits 0 (or grep returns empty for negative-match gates)
If any fail: identify failing gate, trace to upstream TASK-001..009, request remediation
Optional: run gates as a single bash script for reproducibility
integration: All grep / test / jq / pnpm checks pass in single run on a clean tree
